title: 附件
policy_context: 四、獨立第三方審核 > 五、其他事項 > 附件
nearby_paragraphs: 工作許可證 (升降機槽內工作)(範本)
Permit to Work (Work inside lift shaft)
I certify that the above precautions have already been taken. I had briefed the safety procedures to all workers involved in the work and they will be strictly followed in the duration of the work.
本人證明前述安全措施已全部妥善執行。本人已清楚向下列工作人員講解有關安全工作步驟，並保證遵守。
(to be signed before commencement of works 開工前簽發)
